{{Expand}}

{{Infobox technique
| name = Titan's Blade technique
| introduced = Underlord
}}

== Underlord ==
<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">2</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|The [[Titan's Blade technique]] can be used to forge blades to a massive size.<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c19">''Underlord'', chapter 19</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|The [[Titan's Blade technique]] expands the size of a [[sword]] tenfold.<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c20">''Underlord'', chapter 20</ref>}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Techniques]]
[[Category:Underlord]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
